ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for splits and dividends */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient for stock splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the stock holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction was executed */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was executed */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "net_amount" REAL /* Net amount of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., technical analysis, portfolio performance) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being rated */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation provided by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm employing the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)
